ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., ground-based, satellite-based) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station collecting the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "element" TEXT /* Weather element (e.g., tmax, tmin) */,
  "d1" REAL /* Value for day 1 of the month */,
  "d2" REAL /* Value for day 2 of the month */,
  "d3" REAL /* Value for day 3 of the month */,
  "d4" REAL /* Value for day 4 of the month */,
  "d5" REAL /* Value for day 5 of the month */,
  "d6" REAL /* Value for day 6 of the month */,
  "d7" REAL /* Value for day 7 of the month */,
  "d8" REAL /* Value for day 8 of the month */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format used for the weather data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the weather data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the weather data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_element FOREIGN KEY ("element") REFERENCES weather_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather element (e.g., tmax, tmin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather element */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the weather element (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weather element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user's role (JSON object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "request_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's request */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station using the format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "format_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data format */,
  "format_version" TEXT /* Version of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_formats_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., elevation, latitude) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata key */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_metadata_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station using the instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_instruments_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_description" TEXT /* Description of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_calibrations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES weather_station_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
